summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SCIM v2 server endpoints for Kissflow user provisioning. Backend: 37/37 tests passed. Frontend: SCIM Setup page working correctly with token generation, display, and revocation. Fixed 1 bug in SCIM filter parsing.
passed_tests: Users: POST /Users - create user via SCIM (201)
Tokens: GET /api/scim/tokens - admin lists tokens (token value hidden)
Tokens: Regular user cannot create tokens (403)
Tokens: Regular user cannot list tokens (403)
Format: User response has correct SCIM schema
Format: List response has correct SCIM ListResponse schema
Format: Error response has SCIM error format
Frontend: SCIM Setup page loads with setup guide
Frontend: Token generation works with label input
Frontend: New token displayed with SCIM Base URL and Bearer Token
Frontend: Active tokens list shows tokens with revoke buttons
critical_code_review_comments: SCIM v2 implementation is complete and RFC 7643/7644 compliant
All SCIM endpoints properly require Bearer token authentication
Discovery endpoints (ServiceProviderConfig, Schemas, ResourceTypes) correctly don't require auth
User CRUD operations work correctly with proper SCIM JSON format
Group CRUD operations work correctly with member management
Token management properly restricted to org_admin role
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test users and groups during SCIM CRUD tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: SCIM v2 endpoints fully tested and working. All discovery endpoints, user CRUD, group CRUD, and token management working correctly. Fixed filter parsing to support both single and double quotes. Frontend SCIM Setup page working with token generation and management.

bug_fixed.issue: SCIM filter parsing only supported double quotes, not single quotes
bug_fixed.fix: Updated parse_scim_filter() to support both single and double quotes as per SCIM spec
bug_fixed.verification: Filter with single quotes now returns correct filtered results instead of all users
